ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "shop_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Code of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "pos_no" INTEGER /* Point of Sale number for the transaction */,
  "basket_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the basket used in the transaction */,
  "basket_spend" REAL /* Total spending on the basket */,
  "shop_weektime" INTEGER /* Weekday of the shopping date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, mobile payment) */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transaction was part of a promotion */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_basket_code FOREIGN KEY ("basket_code") REFERENCES basket_items ("basket_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_code" TEXT /* Unique code identifying the store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., supermarket, boutique) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the store (cached for quick access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer (cached for quick access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basket_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the basket */,
  "basket_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the basket this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the item */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_basket_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store for which the report is generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the report */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions in the report */,
  "best_selling_product" INTEGER /* ID of the best-selling product in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_best_selling_product FOREIGN KEY ("best_selling_product") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store where the purchase was made */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the customer */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who assisted the customer */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store running the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied during the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., all customers, loyalty members) */,
  "total_discount_given" REAL /* Total discount amount given during the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer visiting the store */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "basket_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent during the visit (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_visits_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store where the staff works */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member in the store */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the staff member */,
  "last_performance_review" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Points earned per dollar spent */,
  "membership_fee" REAL /* Membership fee for the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits offered by the program */,
  "redeemable_rewards" TEXT /* List of redeemable rewards in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_members" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "points_balance" REAL /* Current points balance for the customer */,
  "total_points_redeemed" REAL /* Total points redeemed by the customer */,
  "last_redemption_date" TEXT /* Date of the last point redemption */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Tier level of the loyalty membership (e.g., Gold, Silver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_members_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_members_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)
